summary: Cycle 6 Orchestrator kickoff complete. Agent-Init ran successfully, .venv healthy with all deps. Git pulled (now up to date, 1 tracked delete of old sample fixture noted). Read plan.md (detailed launch roadmap Phases 5-8), orchestrator prompt, SPRINTPLAN, PROJECT_CONTEXT, TODO, handoff from cycle5 Reviewer, DEVELOPMENT_STANDARDS, AGENT_ROLES, IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN_PHASE5. Phase 0 tasks marked done. SPRINTPLAN and PROJECT_CONTEXT updated with reality (Neo4j exporter largely done in code, exporters/CLI main gaps), reference to plan.md, synthetic fixtures planned. First INVEST: exporters foundation (CSV + JSON Lines with redaction/PII safety + tests) + basic CLI wiring for export. All work must follow plan.md exit criteria, natural Russian commits/comments, PII rules, small increments.
last_commit: Обновил SPRINTPLAN и PROJECT_CONTEXT под детальный план до деплоя и запуска (Cycle 6 Phase 5+). Выполнен bootstrap Agent-Init, venv готов, git синхронизирован, Phase 0 отмечены выполненными, добавлена ссылка на plan.md и синтетические фикстуры в roadmap.

issues_found.pattern: deleted in history; tests may require update or synthetic

what_worked_well: Phase 4 testing + PII logger solid per cycle5 Reviewer handoff
what_needs_improvement: Keep SPRINTPLAN in sync with actual code state vs prior notes
suggestions_for_next_agent: Start with CSV/JSONL exporter using graph result + redaction utils; add unit tests; make CLI export call it; commit in Russian human style before Tester handoff

lessons_learned: Always run Agent-Init first; it sets UTF-8 and venv correctly for the session.
plan.md is the single source for full launch path — reference it in all context updates.
inner_loop_summary: PLAN: read all required (prompt, standards, prior handoff, SPRINT, CONTEXT, plan.md). ACT: bootstrap + pull + precise updates to living docs + git identity. REFLECT: state matches plan assessment (exporters/CLI primary gaps); fixture risk noted but synthetic in roadmap; ready for small first Coder task on exporters.
